summary: Portfolio tracker app with buy/sell functionality and transaction history
architectural_notes: Transaction list should be displayed as a separate section below existing portfolio features
Each transaction entry should include: stock symbol, company name, buy/sell type, number of shares, price per share, date/time, and total value

existing_features.title: Display a transaction history panel in a separate section below the existing features (below the archived holdings panel) showing all buy and sell transactions with columns for: stock symbol, company name, transaction type (Buy/Sell badge), number of shares, price per share, date/time, and total value

new_feature_requests.summary: Add transaction list showing all buy/sell transactions with stock symbol, company name, transaction type, shares, price, date/time, and total value

Create a backend function that returns all buy and sell transactions for the authenticated user, including: asset symbol, company name, transaction type (buy/sell), number of shares, price per share, transaction date/time, and total value
